name: Southern Peach Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch baking dish.
3. Place peaches in the dish and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon fructose, almond extract, and cinnamon.
4. In a bowl, combine flour, remaining fructose, baking powder, and salt.
5. Add shortening, milk, and egg to the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed.
6. Spread evenly over the peaches.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Invert onto serving platter.
Recipe makes 9 servings at 124 calories each. Exchanges: 1 bread; 1/2 fat.
